customerKey.title: Customer Key
customerKey.description: The customer's unique identifier (e.g. CUST-000782), if resolving by customer rather than a specific case Id.

newStatus.title: New Status
newStatus.description: The new status to set: New, Under Investigation, Needs More Info, Confirmed Fraud, or False Positive.

riskCaseId.title: Risk Case Id
riskCaseId.description: The Id of the specific Risk_Case__c record to resolve, if known.
